acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in the data-dependent mode
collision energy: fragmenting three most intense ions by CID (isolation width 2 u, normalized collision energy 30)
fragmentation method: fragmenting three most intense ions by CID
instrument: All experiments were done on a 7-Tesla Finnigan LTQ-FT Ultra mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nano electrospray ionization source run in positive ion mode
